snippet.title: La grande malbouffe | ARTE
snippet.description:
Que mangeons-nous r√©ellement en avalant un¬†cordon bleu industriel ?¬†Ce¬†documentaire met la main √† la p√Ęte pour d√©construire les pratiques souvent douteuses de l‚Äôindustrie agroalimentaire.¬†

Toujours plus abondante et moins ch√®re, la nourriture industrielle a envahi nos assiettes, avec des incidences sur la sant√© de plus en plus fortes¬†: jamais l'ob√©sit√© et le diab√®te n'ont √©t√© aussi r√©pandus. Et jamais les √©tiquettes n'ont √©t√© aussi compliqu√©es √† d√©chiffrer. Pour percer les secrets du secteur agroalimentaire, Maud Gangler et Martin Blanchard sont eux-m√™mes devenus‚Ä¶ des industriels. Avec l‚Äôaide d‚Äôun laboratoire alimentaire sp√©cialis√© en recherche et d√©veloppement, ils se lancent dans la production d'un plat populaire¬†: le cordon bleu. Un projet offensif qui leur permet de comprendre de l‚Äôint√©rieur les rouages de l‚Äôultratransform√©, o√Ļ la fabrication d‚Äôun produit en apparence simple tient de l‚Äôassemblage complexe. Pourquoi, alors que l‚Äôescalope pan√©e cuisin√©e √† la maison ne n√©cessite que cinq ingr√©dients, en faut-il ici une trentaine¬†? La viande du cordon bleu m√©rite-t-elle encore son nom¬†? Peut-on appeler fromage cette p√Ęte fondante obtenue √† grand renfort d'additifs¬†? L'emballage lui-m√™me est-il nocif pour la sant√©¬†?

Riche et digeste 
En partant d‚Äôun produit embl√©matique comme le mal nomm√© cordon bleu, puis en √©largissant l'enqu√™te, ce documentaire d√©tricote les fils cach√©s d‚Äôun syst√®me ultraconcurrentiel. Se jouant des fronti√®res, l‚Äôindustrie agroalimentaire se r√©v√®le diaboliquement novatrice, usant de technologies toujours en avance sur les r√©glementations et d‚Äôastuces marketing rod√©es, ou s‚Äôaidant de puissants lobbies pour servir ses int√©r√™ts. Les autorit√©s nationales et europ√©ennes s'avouent techniquement d√©bord√©es et peinent √† contr√īler les substances toxiques qu'elles ont commenc√© par autoriser. Pourtant, l'espoir d‚Äôun changement qualitatif est impuls√© par la soci√©t√© civile¬†: sous la pression des consommateurs et d‚Äôapplications de notation alimentaire comme Yuka, certains industriels cherchent √† mieux faire pour b√©n√©ficier d‚Äôun "clean label" auquel s‚Äôattache le grand public. R√©duction du nombre d'ingr√©dients, abandon d‚Äôadditifs, choix de prot√©ines v√©g√©tales¬†: une d√©marche vertueuse qui tourne parfois au casse-t√™te, quand elle n'aboutit pas √† un effet inverse, avec des plats v√©gans √† la qualit√© sanitaire douteuse. Au menu de cette enqu√™te riche mais remarquablement digeste, experts, nutritionnistes, docteurs en sciences des aliments ou consultants en "transformation positive" √©clairent une question devenue cruciale¬†: que mange-t-on aujourd'hui¬†?

Documentaire de Martin Blanchard et Maud Gangler (France, 2019, 1h30mn)


Abonnez-vous √† la cha√ģne ARTE https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCwI-JbGNsojunnHbFAc0M4Q/?sub_confirmation=1

Se jouant des fronti√®res, l‚Äôindustrie agroalimentaire se r√©v√®le diaboliquement novatrice, usant de technologies toujours en avance sur les r√©glementations et d‚Äôastuces marketing rod√©es, ou s‚Äôaidant de puissants lobbies pour servir ses int√©r√™ts. Les autorit√©s nationales et europ√©ennes s'avouent techniquement d√©bord√©es et peinent √† contr√īler les substances toxiques qu'elles ont commenc√© par autoriser. Pourtant, l'espoir d‚Äôun changement qualitatif est impuls√© par la soci√©t√© civile¬†: sous la pression des consommateurs et d‚Äôapplications de notation alimentaire comme Yuka, certains industriels cherchent √† mieux faire pour b√©n√©ficier d‚Äôun "clean label" auquel s‚Äôattache le grand public. R√©duction du nombre d'ingr√©dients, abandon d‚Äôadditifs, choix de prot√©ines v√©g√©tales¬†: une d√©marche vertueuse qui tourne parfois au casse-t√™te, quand elle n'aboutit pas √† un effet inverse, avec des plats v√©gans √† la qualit√© sanitaire douteuse. Au menu de cette enqu√™te riche mais remarquablement digeste, experts, nutritionnistes, docteurs en sciences des aliments ou consultants en "transformation positive" √©clairent une question devenue cruciale¬†: que mange-t-on aujourd'hui¬†?

Documentaire de Martin Blanchard et Maud Gangler (France, 2019, 1h30mn)

snippet.title: Victoire historique pour le climat : l‚Äô√Čtat condamn√©, l‚Äôinaction climatique est ill√©gale !
snippet.description:
La justice a reconnu que l‚Äôinaction climatique de l‚Äô√Čtat est ill√©gale, que c‚Äôest une faute qui engage sa responsabilit√©. C‚Äôest une victoire historique pour le climat, une victoire pour les 2,3 millions de personnes qui soutiennent l‚ÄôAffaire du Si√®cle.

snippet.title: Dax - KILLSHOT 3 (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
[LYRICS BELOW] Thank You for 3 Million Subscribers! 4 million up next! Like, comment, subscribe, and LET'S SHARE THIS EVERYWHERE! I got one more surprise after we run this up and then 2021 officially BEGINS. 

Available on all streaming at midnight! 

Follow DAX: @thatsdax
Shot by: Moses Israel
Produced by: LexNour Beats
Make Up: Alan Gonzalez Jr
Styled by: Tomi Bruhh
Stunt Coordinator: Kamy Bruder

#killshot #terminator #dax #KILLSHOT3


LYRICS:

Why‚Äôs everybody still calling me a rapper I‚Äôm an artist I just rap for fun but still do it the hardest
Should of known that I was Comin
Like the song I did with MARCUS once I HOPS-IN the beat dispose of the carcass
I remember when I started people tried to call me STUPID so I took the liberty to level up and go RETARDED
This is ain‚Äôt mainstream music I see RED WHEN I RAP don‚Äôt compare me to these people who see RED ON A CARPET
so I took
To another dimension
There‚Äôs no BIRDS here in SPACE I ain‚Äôt seeing ya MENTIONS 
Niggas claim I Eint shit,
then go use my shit to get them views, notoriety, and fucking attention
It‚Äôs a FAMINE in this industry a rap RECESSION
The only SUBSTANCE is ABUSE let me CUT the TENSION,
I‚Äôm being real rap back I was sent by the great and I swore I would fucking protect it

[HOOK] (sorry yall couldnt fit it all in here lolol)

These people hate it when your self made
It‚Äôs BLUE FLAME when I BURST and DISPERSE RAGE
Don‚Äôt gotta PHYSICALLY TUSSLE  I let my WORDS PLAY
Knew that I was SPECIAL cuz the BUS I took back in FIRST GRADE
Momma told me don‚Äôt listen they don‚Äôt know pain
No names PLAYING with me but ain‚Äôt NO GAME
I don‚Äôt MISS whatever I drop HITS
It‚Äôs a STRETCH if you RUNNING wit me I SWEAT PROPANE
KICK IT FLIP IT I‚Äôm SKAITNG laps around these fucking gimmicks
I‚Äôm wicked twisted I‚Äôm half insane and diagnosed as gifted
My words VERTICALLY exceed the ROLLERCOASTER LIMIT that‚Äôs why when they try to WRITE(ride) along they FUCKING MISS IT
I‚Äôm (P)ainting (P)ictures to (P)erfect to (P)ick a (P)art and diss it
they don‚Äôt the Knowledge the Strength and Integrity is missing
I remember days when my streaming numbers were (P)ots to( P)iss in
(P)eople tried to talk but they couldn‚Äôt SEE that I had a VISION
Eminem done paved a path
Pac saw me in a dream
J-cole can really hoop we should play on the same team driving down the lane he could kick it to me 4 3 (for three)....2 1 beating these buzz(ers)ards and taking straight leads
I‚Äôm half amazing the other half is the energy of every great poet Sharskeperian type MC Mozart, Bach, Beethoven inspired melodies candence from an angel that devilish yet heavenly
Watch how I summon the beast
Watch how my mouth is foaming when I step in the booth and I know I‚Äôm bout fuck up a beat
Watch I slow it down for you then bring it back up to USAIN BOLT WORLD RECORD speed
ALPHA-MALE-BETIC flow my (LM)‚Äôs don‚Äôt know(O)
(P)‚Äôs so I stay on my (Q)‚Äôs cuz they SLEEPING just like straight (Z)‚Äôs
niggas hate on me then see them go try and COPY
cuz Spitting these FAX so they PRINTING them like MACHINES
gimme the mic gimme the booth
gimme me the beat that LEX produced
gimme the strength to fill shoes of the greats and delivery truth
gimme the tools to fuel the youth, replenish spend then recoup then redirect negativity pointed at me to you
gimme the chance to redo, review, remove, any excuse and push through any obstruction or rule that tries to reduce
my MATHEMATICAL flow that‚Äôs ADDS me in every room but me SUBTRACTS me from the trash that they‚Äôve been force feeding to you
honestly I might quit
I miss my janitor job and the long night shifts
I stick to myself cuz my TOUCH IS MIDAS
TRUST everything that I TOUCH SPREADS LIKE VIRUS
I don‚Äôt give a fuck if you hate or you don‚Äôt like this
I don‚Äôt Len flows my last name ain‚Äôt Bias
I can‚Äôt be BOUGHT my MUSIC is PRICELESS
and I‚Äôve been all in their MOUTH like BRONCHITIS
niggas be trash they buy it
i‚Äôm so sick of the music climate
SCOOBADIVING SWIMMING into mainSTREAM with the SHARKS and STEALING like a PIRATE
fucking up GIANTS, DAVID you‚Äôre GOLIATH
TRUMPing the game I‚Äôll JOE your BIDEN
wanna be me the only thing you‚Äôll ever (B)-is-HEPATITIS
niggas be talking like I ain‚Äôt the NICEST-MEANEST
FLOW it‚Äôs DRIPS POSEIDEN
word play concepts blow your mind with triple ententes and perfect timing
I‚Äôm in constant rhyming
morning night I‚Äôm constantly grinding who‚Äôs better I don‚Äôt care but I know I‚Äôm top 5 greatest of all time and
Listen I‚Äôm fukin here ya it aint a mistake
and with the shit I‚Äôve already dropped I can‚Äôt be erased replaced removed and ima do whatever it takes to have a seat at the table with the rest of greats
I Ain‚Äôt focused on the BEEF less we talking some STEAK cuz I got TOO MUCH AT IT to step out my lane I said it once I‚Äôm the beginning and I‚Äôll say it again I went from STUPID to RETARDED now I‚Äôm GOING INSANE.

[HOOK]



btw if u made it down here you are a FOOKING REAL ONE! love you!

snippet.title: Billie Eilish - The Making of 'Therefore I Am' | Vevo Footnotes
snippet.description:
Billie Eilish - The Making Of...Therefore I Am (Vevo Footnotes) 

Bouncing around the mall with Billie Eilish sounds like fun, and as the singer moves from the pretzels to the donuts to the soda fountain, "Therefore I Am" becomes a portrait of a pop star fulfilling a few desires that we all have once in a while. This episode of Footnotes is an exclusive interview with Billie, who directed the action at the Glendale Galleria, which was shot on her mom's iPhone. Find out where she and her manager were when the idea for the shoot first struck them. Find out which designer made her outfit. Find out why she neve ate that pretzel she grabbed. Lots of tidbits waiting for you in Footnotes. 

Watch the "Therefore I Am" official video: https://youtu.be/RUQl6YcMalg

Watch Billie Eilish music videos: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCiGm_E4ZwYSHV3bcW1pnSeQ

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceX‚Äôs second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äď approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: Starlink Mission
snippet.description:
SpaceX is targeting Thursday, February 4 for launch of 60 Starlink satellites from Space Launch Complex 40 (SLC-40) at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station in Florida. The instantaneous window is at 1:19 a.m. EST, or 6:19 UTC.

The Falcon 9 first stage rocket booster supporting this mission previously flew on four missions: the launches of GPS III Space Vehicle 03 and Turksat 5A and two Starlink missions. Following stage separation, SpaceX will land Falcon 9‚Äôs first stage on the ‚ÄúOf Course I Still Love You‚ÄĚ droneship, which will be located in the Atlantic Ocean. One half of Falcon 9‚Äôs fairing previously flew on the SAOCOM-1B mission, and the other previously flew in support of the GPS III Space Vehicle 03 mission.

snippet.title: Poutine, l‚Äôirr√©sistible ascension | ARTE
snippet.description:
En 2000, un documentariste russe filme de l'int√©rieur la premi√®re ann√©e au pouvoir de Vladimir Poutine. Pr√®s de vingt ans plus tard,¬†Vitaly Mansky,¬†d√©sormais exil√©, remonte¬†ses archives¬†et en propose une relecture critique. La fascinante naissance en direct d'un potentat surdou√©, secret et cynique. Grand Prix "Documentaire international" au Fipadoc 2019.

"Je pars." Le 31 d√©cembre 1999, Boris Eltsine annonce √† la t√©l√©vision sa d√©mission du poste de pr√©sident de la F√©d√©ration de Russie. En attendant la tenue de nouvelles √©lections en mai, il nomme comme rempla√ßant int√©rimaire son chef du gouvernement, Vladimir Poutine, √† la cote de popularit√© au plus bas. L'ancien officier du KGB est intronis√© le soir m√™me dans la liesse g√©n√©rale du Nouvel An (premi√®re habilet√© politique). Poutine se sert de sa nouvelle position comme d'un tremplin, et, sans avoir vraiment men√© campagne, est √©lu au premier tour de la pr√©sidentielle. Il est alors suivi par Vitaly Mansky, charg√© pour la t√©l√©vision d'√Čtat de filmer la passation de pouvoir et de composer un portrait autoris√© du nouvel homme fort du pays. Pr√®s de vingt ans plus tard, le documentariste, entr√© en dissidence et d√©sormais exil√©, remonte son film et propose une relecture critique de ses images, √† l'aune de l'ascension du potentat Poutine.

Imp√©n√©trable et cynique 
"Celui qui approuve sans mot dire n'est plus seulement un t√©moin, il devient un complice." Pour Vitaly Mansky, tout √©tait l√†, √† port√©e de main. Il suffisait de d√©crypter un mat√©riau qui annon√ßait d√©j√†, en 2000, le futur de la Russie. √Ä travers ses s√©quences dans l'intimit√© du pouvoir, ses t√™te-√†-t√™te avec le nouveau ma√ģtre du Kremlin et des moments apparemment anodins, c'est tout simplement le basculement dans un r√©gime totalitaire qu'il nous montre. Vladimir Poutine s'y r√©v√®le d√©j√† secret et cynique, et semble pr√™t √† tout pour consolider sa mainmise sur le pays, pendant que l'on assiste aussi, en priv√©, √† l'affaiblissement physique de Boris Eltsine. √Ä partir de ses propres images et d'archives publiques ou priv√©es, le documentariste √©crit √† la premi√®re personne un roman politique singulier, dont personne, √† l'heure actuelle, ne sait encore comment il se terminera.

Documentaire de Vitaly Mansky (Suisse, 2018, 1h35mn)

Disponible jusqu'au 02/04/2021

snippet.title: Mass Effect‚ĄĘ Legendary Edition Official Reveal Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
Pre-order now: https://www.ea.com/games/mass-effect/mass-effect-legendary-edition/buy/ 
 
Relive the legend of Commander Shepard in the highly acclaimed Mass Effect trilogy with the Mass Effect‚ĄĘ Legendary Edition.
 
Includes single-player base content and over 40 DLC from Mass Effect, Mass Effect 2, and Mass Effect 3 games, including promo weapons, armors, and packs ‚Äď remastered and optimized for 4K Ultra HD.
 
The updated trilogy launches May 14 on PlayStation¬ģ4 and Xbox One with forward compatibility and targeted enhancements on Xbox Series X|S and PlayStation¬ģ5, as well as on PC via Origin and Steam.
 
Find out more: https://www.ea.com/games/mass-effect/mass-effect-legendary-edition

ABOUT MASS EFFECT‚ĄĘ LEGENDARY EDITION:
 
One person is all that stands between humanity and the greatest threat it‚Äôs ever faced. Relive the legend of Commander Shepard in the highly acclaimed Mass Effect trilogy with the Mass Effect‚ĄĘ Legendary Edition. Includes single-player base content and over 40 DLC from Mass Effect, Mass Effect 2, and Mass Effect 3 games, including promo weapons, armors, and packs ‚Äď remastered and optimized for 4K Ultra HD.
 
Experience an amazingly rich and detailed universe where your decisions have profound consequences on the action and the outcome.
 
RELIVE THE CINEMATIC SAGA:  Heart-pounding action meets gripping interactive storytelling where you decide how your unique story unfolds.
Three Games ‚Äď One Launcher: Play through the single-player base content and over 40 DLC from all three games, including promo weapons, armors, and packs.
Remastered for a New Generation: Experience the trilogy in 4K Ultra HD with enhanced performance, visuals, and graphics, all available in HDR.
Visual Improvements on All Three Games: Updates include enhanced models, shaders, FX, lighting, and depth of field. 
 
EXPERIENCE THE LEGEND OF SHEPARD:  Create and customize your own character, from appearance and skills to a personalized arsenal then lead your elite recon squad across a galaxy in turmoil.
New Shepard Customizations: With improved hair, makeup, eye color and skin tones you can create your Shepard in a unified character creator with all options available across the full trilogy, or choose to play as the iconic Femshep from Mass Effect 3 now available in all titles.
Gameplay Enhancements for the First Mass Effect‚ĄĘ Game: Enjoy improved aiming and weapons balance, SFX, input/controls, squad behavior, cover behavior, and gameplay cameras.
 
REFLECT ON YOUR CHOICES:  Your choices seamlessly travel from one game to the next. Each decision you make will control the outcome of every mission, every relationship, every battle ‚Äď and even the fate of the galaxy itself.
Performance Mode Options: Supports ultra-high refresh rates on PC, and offers a choice between "Favor Quality" for increased resolution or "Favor Framerate" to boost your FPS on consoles.
 
INCLUDED CONTENT:  Mass Effect‚ĄĘ Legendary Edition includes single-player base content for all three titles (Mass Effect, Mass Effect 2 and Mass Effect 3), your favorite single-player story DLC, promo weapons, armors, and packs:

snippet.title: Survivre aux PI√ąGES de ces 3 FILMS ūü§° (Saw, Cube. Battle Royale)
snippet.description:
Comme vous, j'adore les films d‚Äôhorreur ! Mais souvent la stupidit√© des personnages m‚Äôagacent : ils meurent parce qu‚Äôils font les mauvais choix ! Et je suis dans mon si√®ge de cin√©ma en me disant ‚Äúmais va pas l√† !‚ÄĚ. Dans cette vid√©o, on va √™tre plus intelligent ! On va trouver des astuces pour survivre aux pi√®ges des 8 films Saw, de Cube et de Battle Royale, comme ca si ca vous arrive un jour, vous saurez comment filouter !

Je pr√©cise que dans le film Cube la pi√®ce "999" n'est pas fixe mais c'est une des nombreuses incoh√©rences math√©matique du film. L'autre possibilit√© et qu'un mouvement du cube am√®ne en position 27 mais √ßa ne semble pas √™tre possible, je n'ai trouv√© personne qui a trouv√© le chiffre (il faudrait pouvoir g√©n√©rer la totalit√© du cube en √©liminant les incoh√©rences de double position, personne s'est chauff√© √† faire √ßa). Nous disons dans la vid√©o qu'un quart des pi√®ces sont pi√©g√©s, on part d'un principe qu'un nombre √† 1/5 de chances d'√™tre pi√©g√©s (nombre premiers entre 1 et 999 + 25 puissances de nombre premier) puis on part de la possibilit√© d'en avoir une seconde (3,7249%) et une troisi√®me (0,7189%) ; la m√©thode de calcul n'est peut-√™tre pas la bonne, et certains s'accordent √† dire que 534 pi√®ces sont pi√©g√©es, soit la moiti√© du cube. On a voulu faire les calculs nous m√™me sans s'aider des papiers math√©matiques sur le sujet ... on verra ce qu'en pense les math√©maticiens dans les commentaires !

Allez voir la video de El Ji sur le sujet : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uW5XVwgYpSY

snippet.title: Spot's Got an Arm!
snippet.description: Now that Spot has an arm in addition to legs and cameras, it can do mobile manipulation.  It finds and picks up objects (trash), tidies up the living room, opens doors, operates switches and valves, tends the garden, and generally has fun.  Motion of the hand, arm and body are automatically coordinated to simplify manipulation tasks and expand the arm's workspace, making its reach essentially unbounded.  The behavior shown here was programmed using a new API for mobile manipulation that supports autonomy and user applications, as well as a tablet that lets users do remote operations.  For more information, visit https://www.bostondynamics.com/spot-arm.

Un jour, Folco trouve la photo d√©chir√©e, pourtant r√©ussie, d'un jeune homme. Tous les jours, il retrouve √† nouveau une photo de cet homme aux quatre coins de la ville. snippet.title: Mando's Bounty LTM | Fortnite
snippet.description:
Got a job for you. All the info you need is here: https://fn.gg/MandosBounty

It‚Äôs one thing to be the best bounty hunter on the Island, it‚Äôs another to be the best in the galaxy. In the new Mando‚Äôs Bounty LTM, compete to out-hunt all your opponents ‚ÄĒ but watch out: if you‚Äôre in the lead, you‚Äôre the bounty of The Mandalorian himself. 

Overcome your opponents ‚ÄĒ and Mando ‚ÄĒ to receive a very special reward. Much better than receiving guild rates, we‚Äôre talking about a specially-forged Beskar Umbrella.

Playing Solo or with others, collect galactic credits by eliminating the target on your Bounty Puck or any opponent you see. The first to reach the credit goal wins the match (assuming they can prove themselves against Mando first, of course). All players start out with three lives. This is the way.

Want a tip? The Island-dwelling Hunters targeting you and other players are holding the best loot, so take them out to build up your credits AND arsenal. 

Need a break from the hunt? Stop by Kit‚Äôs new cantina on the Island, located in the desert. Your name is already legendary there.

There‚Äôs more than just one Victory Umbrella this Season. As mentioned earlier, for getting a Victory Royale in Mando‚Äôs Bounty, you‚Äôll unlock the commemorative Beskar Umbrella. Forged by the ancestral artisans of its alloy metal, this Umbrella bears the signet of a clan of two.

Now more than ever, you are both hunter and prey. Mando‚Äôs Bounty is available from today, February 2, to February 9 at 9 AM ET! 

#FortniteSeason5 #MandosBounty


Play Fortnite Battle Royale, the completely free 100-player PvP mode. One giant map, A Battle Bus, Last one standing wins. ESRB Rating: Teen with Violence.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fortnite/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/FortniteGame
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/FortniteGame/

Learn More: https://www.epicgames.com/fortnite/en-US/

snippet.title: Brawl Stars Animation: Season 5 - The #StarrForce
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ‚ÄĒ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/
